title: pkcs11 struct comment: algorithm_cache says 'Panics on HSM error' but algorithm() now returns Err
description: The algorithm_cache field comment on the struct reads: 'Panics on HSM error rather than silently returning the wrong algorithm.' The algorithm() method was changed to return Err instead of panicking (per the 7f82a33 commit and its own updated docstring), but the struct-level field comment was not updated. A contributor reading the struct will believe algorithm() panics and write incorrect error-handling code (e.g., catch_unwind instead of ? propagation).
